name: Green Chicken Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip each tortilla in hot cooking oil.
2. Place 2 tablespoons of chopped, cooked chicken filling on each tortilla and roll them up.
3. Place the rolled tortillas seam side down in a baking dish.
4. Prepare the sauce: Peel dried leaves from tomatillos and boil with water, green chili pepper, and garlic until tender. Remove the skin and blend all ingredients together. Add enough of the boiling water used for blending to achieve desired consistency.
5. Slice 2 or 3 avocados and fold them into the sauce.
6. Pour the sauce over the enchiladas.
7. Grate Mozzarella cheese and sprinkle on top.
8. Place in an oven to melt the cheese.
9. Before serving, you may add sour cream if desired.
